title: Orthotopic lung epithelial cell transplantation
author: sprotocols
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This protocol describes a method for orthotopic transplantation of purified lung epithelial cells from uninjured donors into influenza-injured recipient mice.
steps_raw: This protocol describes a method for orthotopic transplantation of purified lung epithelial cells from uninjured donors into influenza-injured recipient mice.
